switch_window.purpose: Fixed round-1 local evaluation slice around t_switch.

switch_window_eval.note: Shared fixed slice for switch-window metrics across all four Phase C round-1 arms.

design_rationale: All four Phase C round-1 arms must share one identical split artifact.
Validation and test both preserve pre and post regions instead of becoming post-only.
The switch-window around t_switch is kept as a dedicated local evaluation slice, not mixed into train.
This artifact is model-agnostic and can be consumed later by iTransformer-side dataset code.
